headline: Norway Coach Praises Erling Haaland's Match-Winning Ability
body: Norway head coach Stale Solbakken praised Manchester City striker Erling Haaland as a great matchwinner for his team.
text:
🗣️ "He's been a great matchwinner in many, many games for us."

Norway head coach Stale Solbakken on Manchester City striker Erling Haaland.

Video
draft_caption:
